title: Fix workflow prompt truncation — raise extraChars budget
summary: PROMPT_BUDGET_FULL.extraChars is 1,000 chars but BASE_WORKFLOW_PROMPT is ~3,800 chars. Rules 5–9 are silently dropped every turn. Raise extraChars to 4,500 and totalChars to 6,000.
details:
In src/config/soul-loader.ts, the PROMPT_BUDGET_FULL constant caps extraChars at 1,000. The workflow prompt built in src/config/prompts.ts (BASE_WORKFLOW_PROMPT) is approximately 3,800 characters and is passed as extraInstructions to buildSystemPrompt(). The clampText() call inside buildSystemPrompt silently truncates it to 1,000 chars, meaning Rules 5–9 (status/memory, ambiguity, post-action reporting, user_message relay, credential link relay) are never injected into the context. This is a silent data loss bug — the rules are written but never seen by the model.

Fix: raise PROMPT_BUDGET_FULL.extraChars from 1000 to 4500, and raise totalChars from 3600 to 6000. The env var overrides (PROMETHEUS_PROMPT_TOTAL_CHARS) still take precedence, so production deployments with custom budgets are unaffected.
